basic_details.job_title: NeGD Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Business Analyst and Full Stack Developer Posts
basic_details.post_name: Business Analyst and Full Stack Developer
basic_details.short_information: National e-Governance Division (NeGD) Business Analyst and Full Stack Developer Notification 2026 has been released on 15 July 2026 on the official website of NeGD. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the NeGD Recruitment 2026 for the posts of Business Analyst and Full Stack Developer.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, IT, Business Administration, or a related field, B.E./B.Tech./MCA/M.Sc. in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field
qualification.details: Business Analyst: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, IT, Business Administration, or a related field. Preferred certifications: Agile or Scrum. Full Stack Developer: B.E./B.Tech./MCA/M.Sc. in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NeGD Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NeGD to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.national_e_governance_division_negd: Business Analyst and Full Stack Developer
Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, IT, Business Administration, or a related field, B.E./B.Tech./MCA/M.Sc. in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field

content_sections.heading: NeGD Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NeGD Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NeGD Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NeGD Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Business Analyst: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, IT, Business Administration, or a related field. Preferred certifications: Agile or Scrum. Full Stack Developer: B.E./B.Tech./MCA/M.Sc. in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.

content_sections.heading: NeGD Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

rows.event: Last Date for submission of applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NeGD Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NeGD to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NeGD recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the NeGD Business Analyst and Full Stack Developer posts is 30th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this NeGD recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the posts of Business Analyst and Full Stack Developer in the National e-Governance Division.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: For Business Analyst, a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, IT, or Business Administration is required. For Full Stack Developer, a B.E./B.Tech./MCA/M.Sc. in Computer Science or IT is needed.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts in this recruitment is 45 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for NeGD recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Business Analyst and Full Stack Developer posts will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for NeGD jobs?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to apply online through the official NeGD website for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Business Analyst and Full Stack Developer are on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the NeGD located?
faq.answer: The National e-Governance Division (NeGD) is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110003.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from any state apply for this job?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the location as Delhi, but it is generally open to eligible candidates from all states unless otherwise stated in the official notification.
